## Release — backlog-campaign v0.3.0

### ✨ What's new in v0.3.0

This release tightens **who may edit what** during a campaign and documents **epic-scale** orchestration so large backlogs stay reviewable.

#### Agent tool boundaries

- **`agent-tools.md`** — shared runbook for which tools each role may use; coordinator routes without direct file edits
- **Coordinator contract** — `disallowedTools` on the coordinator agent (Claude/Cursor manifests) so implementation stays on workers
- **`bun run verify`** — new **V-TOOLS-01** and **V-EPIC-01** checks keep deny-lists and epic references synced across compiled targets

#### Epic orchestration

- **`epic-orchestration.md`** — playbook for splitting and sequencing epics without dropping findings or breaking one-PR-per-issue discipline
- **Handle / plan / split references** — aligned with epic flows in `issue-splitting.md`, `phase-handle.md`, and campaign prompts

#### Planning & review

- **PLAN_CONTEXT** — planners receive richer campaign context for touch-paths and scope boundaries
- **Review-phase fixes** — reviewer and synthesizer agents updated for clearer handoff and schema-conformant returns

---

**Full feature overview:** see [v0.1.0 release notes](https://github.com/CorentinLumineau/backlog-campaign/releases/tag/v0.1.0) · [README](https://github.com/CorentinLumineau/backlog-campaign#readme)
